'''Bavar Breathing Systems''' was a corporation based on [[Tasariq]] in operation during the high reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Bavar Breathing Systems produced [[Breath mask/Legends|breathing masks]] for the native [[Tasari]] which were also used by visiting [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and [[Miner/Legends|miners]].<ref name="J15" />

{{Company-stub}}
